calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, LIMITED APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Perdue for Petitioner. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Perdue stated that the examiner's notes had been addressed. Mr. Ferdon stated that the SFPA had priorty as all the parties were out of the United States. Mr. Perdue reported that the grandson was now in Seattle. After reviewing the file, Mr. Ferdon stated that the sole heir gave 100% interest to the son. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond in the amount of $10,000.00 is required.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, LIMITED APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
